channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fridge freezer flytipped, 18th May
item.description:
Someone has flytipped a fridge freezer behind my garden during the day today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glimpsing Green, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking driveway fire access, 18th May
item.description:
Blocking emergency access, driveway and on double yellow lines with blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees need cutting back., 18th May
item.description:
Over growth affecting light .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on a Lamberh Council storage unit and refuse containers at Sidney road SW9. Unfortunately more graffiti has been sprayed by a telephone box on the lower level of grey panelling, 18th May
item.description:
I like to report a surge of graffiti along Robstart Street and Sidney road SW9. The graffiti is on a Lambeth council storage unit and two refuse containers. There is more graffiti further up the road by a telephone box on the lower level. Please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Robsart Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting is off, 18th May
item.description:
The lights are broken again on the main street. The narrow alley to flat 6-32 is already dark and dangerous as it is, with no light coming from the street is even worst.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blissett Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights broken (once again), 18th May
item.description:
The lights in front of the entrance door of flat 6 -32 Blissett Street is out again. The area is used by people to do drugs and have ASB so having proper lighting is critical. Can this be fixed please?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blissett Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of rubbish, 18th May
item.description:
Huge amount of rubbish inside the council steamer house area. How can the council give this amazing good example for the population???

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Globe Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti on wall, entrance to Holford House from Camilla Road, 18th May
item.description:
This graffiti has been here for at least a month, it's opposite the bins cupboard entrance to Holford House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Simms Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked fire access and driveway, 18th May
item.description:
Double yellow blips blocking driveway and emergency access.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 18th May
item.description:
Pruning required as unable to walk on pavement without ducking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chinese Roundabout, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike left here for 2 days, 18th May
item.description:
There is a Lime bike left outside my house for 2 days. Neighbours know nothing about it. Please come and get it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Hayes Chase, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poorly repaired pavement, 18th May
item.description:
A dead tree trunk was felled last week and the hole was filled with hard core stones and today has been covered with tarmac. There are loads of loose stones and debris of tarmac in the road and if the cars drive the stones fly up in the air. The little stones should’ve been swept away. The actual repair is uneven and looks unsightly as a patch job and is uneven and not covering the hardcore underneath properly. It’s easy to trip on it and it looks dangerous as it has been roughly done.It is easy to trip . Outside 66 Cranbourne gardens.We were promised a new tree to replace old one.This is a complete mess of a job and needs rectifying please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranbourne Gardens, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick paving lifting up and uneven causing trip hazard, 18th May
item.description:
This has been here for over 5 years and still causing a trip hazard. Brick paving needs to be levelled as it is uneven and lifted up. Next to the drain and communal grass area where a bike is located to a lamp post.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magdalene Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rat in road, 18th May
item.description:
Dead rat in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Elmfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on path, 18th May
item.description:
Been there weeks. Person in wheelchair had to go in road to get past outside number 26 Marlborough Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox outside 10 Shoreham Way, 18th May
item.description:
Dea fox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shoreham Way, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bin, 18th May
item.description:
Three months were every morning and evening th vin has been overflowing onto street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked parking space on Ennersdale Road, 18th May
item.description:
The owners of 1a Ennersdale Road continually block the CPZ spaces on Ennersdale Road with cones and barriers to ensure access to their lock up, despite their not being a crossover/dropped curb for this purpose

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Ennersdale Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cycle shed, 18th May
item.description:
Graffiti on cycle shed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawson's Hill Footpath (Overhill Road to Bredinghurst), East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and large tv, 18th May
item.description:
A mattress, a large tv and other smaller items have been dumped on the pavement. These items have been there for approximately 5 days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
